creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Looking into this a bit longer, it's actually a bit more difficult.

The port depends (optionally) on various PDO modules.

These PDO modules do exist in PHP5, PHP53 and PHP52 flavors, but the =
port depends on the PHP5-variant.

I'm pretty sure, though, the port works with any of them.
Is there a way to honor the=20
DEFAULT_PHP_VER=3D53
setting from my build-environment throughout all PHP stuff?
